title: Chunky
description: Ever wanted Minecraft to be harder for no reason? Well here it is, 9 chunks for one mineral (besides netherite scrap)
body:
Wanted to make the game harder for no reason? Well here you go!
This mod adds 10 chunks that make early game progression way longer.
You get the chunks by mining its respective ore, and to get the actual item, you need 9 chunks of that respective mineral.
**Ancient debris is an exception only requiring 4.**
Made with MCreator!
